ksa_text: Develop and maintain data and AI program plans, including scope definition, data governance frameworks, standards and policies, workforce requirements assessment, and resource allocation strategies.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA OP-T-001 (Operational Excellence/Task) is excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.439, highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.439). pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis does not surface this Operational Excellence competency as a standard Decision Scientist requirement. Exclusion consistent with the role's technical focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
